text: - **LLM distill must stay a non-deterministic *input*** to the graph, never a derived node. [...] - **Wall-clock `now`** ("just now", 90s TTL, NIP-40 expirations) must be modeled as an input — good for replay, but a pervasive mechanical change. [...] - **Keep bulk out of the graph** (transcripts, raw event JSON, chat bodies → store hashes/summaries), and note presence-row storage growth is a pruner problem Trellis doesn't touch.
